references.key: if rs1 i rs2 i set bit i in gp rd to 1 otherwise 0
references.raw: V CMP GT VV MASK gp rd, v rs1, v rs2 — Compare vector rs1 with rs2 element-wise. If rs1[i] > rs2[i], set bit i in gp rd to 1, otherwise 0. Use case: updating max val and argmax idx in the argmax loop.
references.title: If rs1[i] > rs2[i], set bit i in gp rd to 1, otherwise 0

references.key: writes 1 0 to v rd at top k positions 0 0 elsewhere
references.raw: V TOPK MASK v rd, v rs1, imm k — Identifies the k largest elements in vector rs1. Writes 1.0 to v rd at top-k positions, 0.0 elsewhere. Use case: transfer index = top k(confidence, k).
references.title: Writes 1.0 to v rd at top-k positions, 0.0 elsewhere
